stemHtml: An aircraft has been parked outside overnight, in freezing conditions. The crew decides to depart WITHOUT having the airframe de-iced/anti-iced. What could be the principal danger during take-off?

options.a: Loss of control due to frozen deposits on the wings, which reduce C<sub>LMAX</sub>.
options.b: A higher stall speed due to wing contamination and reduced drag.
options.c: Uncommanded roll due to frozen deposits on the wings, which increase C<sub>LMAX</sub>.
options.d: A lower stall speed due to wing contamination and increased drag.
